task_description: TDD implementation of advanced error handling (specific error types in Catch blocks), retry policies on ProcessAudio and PollyTask, observability improvements (Lambda X-Ray tracing, structured JSON logging, CloudWatch Alarms, optional Dashboard), and ARCHITECTURE.md documentation updates.

verification.summary: Build passes (go build ./...). All CDK tests pass (68s, includes 7 new tests for retries, alarms, X-Ray, specific error types). Lambda tests pass (0.003s, includes structured logging test). Snapshot regenerated. Tests are meaningful - they assert CDK resource properties that would fail if implementation were reverted.
